titleStmt.title: SII 27.113: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 113. (A.R. No. 263 of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶĀ, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the temple called Garaḍi.
This is dated Śaka 1359, Naḷa, Kārttika śu. 2, Friday corresponding to 1436 A.D., October 12. The Śaka year was current.

It records a gift of land called Aṁpāraharavari in Muṅgi-nāḍu, with the permission of the king by Toḷahara Śaṅkara-nāyaka, to the temple of Nārāyaṇadēva in Hattukēri of the Tuḷu-rājya for feeding brāhmaṇas. It also refers to a gift to the temple of goddess Durgādēvi Mahāpradhāna Aṇṇappa is stated to have been governing Bārākūrurājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trayilōkya
nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1359 ne
ya naḷasaṁvatsarada kārttika su 2 sulu śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru vijayūnagariya rājadhāniyalu sukha
saṁkathā vinōdadiṁ samasta rājyaṁgaḷanu sakala vaṁrnnāśramada dharṁmmaṁgaḷanu pratipāli
suva kāladalu Ā mahārāyara nirūpadiṁ mahāpradhānaṁ Aṁṇapagaḷu bārakūra rā
jyavanu pratipālisuvali nālvatunāḍa Oḷagaṇa koṟagiyalu toḷahara baḷiya dēvaya kaṁ
baḷiyaṟaḷiya saṁkharanāyakaru Ā mahārāyara sēveyanu māḍi muṁgināḍa Oḷagaṇa
Aṁpāra haravariyanu sarvvamūṁnyadalu bāḷuvaṁtāgi śāsanadapaṭeyanu rāyara ka
yyalu nirūpa koṁḍu tuḷurājyada kaṭṭaḷeya hattu kēriya madhyastānada śrī
mannā rāyaṇa dēvarasthānadalu Ā śaṁkara nāyakanu hattukēriya halara muṁde
brāhmaṇabhōjanada dhāreya neṟadu mūḍida Aṁpāra haravariya bāḷikeya Ura vivara teṁ
ka Aṁpāru ra Āṁharukaṁ cattūru hilivīḍu kuyya koḍageyāgi Ayidu Ūḷi
ga dharṁma kaṭṭaḷe janana sīme svāṁmya holanela Āṁ ka dīpa leya kaṁbha Āḷu
bāḷa dēvatāsdhānamuṁtāgi Alliyēnu Uḷaṁthā sarvva sīmeyanu Oddu Ā haravari
yalu yēḷumaṁdi brāṁhmaṇa bhōjanakke naḍeva Akki jatada hāneyalu nāḍa nāga
ṁḍugadalu Akkimū 70 hoṟagulige Aḍigeya brāhmaṇage kēḍuva Akki mū 3
tiṁgaḷiṁge śrīnāraṇadēvarige śanivāra 4 mahādēvarige sōmavā
ra yaṁ tiṁgaḷu 1 kaṁ vāra 8 kkaṁ mosaru saha Akkināḍa hāne 10
naḍeva Akki mū 3 Aṁttu va 1 kaṁ naḍava Akki mū 76 dēvara naivē
tuppa teṁgu naḍasi bāḷuvaru Ā haravariya janana sīme svā
ṁmya ho lanelanalli Āki sarigaḷiṁda tappidaḍenu hattukēriya halaru
vāgi vicāramāḍi batta nilisi yi dharṁmmavanu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyi yā
baharu . Alliṁ durggā dēviyara devatāstānada nālku Okkaliga seṭṭi The rest of the inscription is completely
Digital edition of SII 27.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
